officialName.tj: Кумитаи ҳолатҳои фавқулодда ва мудофиаи граждании назди Ҳукумати Ҷумҳурии Тоҷикистон
officialName.ru: Комитет по чрезвычайным ситуациям и гражданской обороне при Правительстве Республики Таджикистан

officialNameNotes.tj_source: https://khf.tj/ page <title> + repeated in news body text. Short forms used on-site: «КҲФ», «Кумита».
officialNameNotes.ru_source: https://kchs.tj/ page <title> + node/1230 heading. Short forms used on-site: «КЧС», «Комитет по ЧС и ГО».
officialNameNotes.en_source: NOT PRESENT on either legacy site. Neither site has an English UI or an English org name anywhere. Only /react-new is in English and it never names the Committee. Must be supplied by the client — do not guess.

addressVariants.tj_contacts_page: Шаҳри Душанбе, ноҳияи Шоҳмансур, кӯчаи Лоҳутӣ, 26 — Индекс 734013
addressVariants.ru_header_banner: Республика Таджикистан: г. Душанбе, ул. Лохути, 26
addressVariants.note: Both sites agree on street + number + postal index 734013. The Tajik contacts page additionally names the city district (ноҳияи Шоҳмансур). No English address published.

phones.source: site-wide header line on BOTH khf.tj and kchs.tj; also listed as central-apparatus phone on both contacts pages and in the sidebar phone image
phones.note: The single most consistently published number across both legacy sites.
Russian header only. No Tajik-language label published.

phones.source: kchs.tj site-wide header line; also central-apparatus phone on kchs.tj/node/197
kchs.tj site-wide header line; also central-apparatus phone on kchs.tj/node/197
site-wide header line on BOTH khf.tj ("(992 37) 221-91-19 (факс)") and kchs.tj ("факс: (+992 37) 221-91-19")
phones.note: IMPORTANT: khf.tj/node/116 (ТАМОС) mistakenly lists this same number as a central-apparatus voice phone. Both site headers explicitly label it as the FAX. Trust the header.

phones.source: sidebar phone image /sites/default/files/phone_mchs_0.png, present on EVERY page of BOTH sites
phones.note: UNLABELLED. The image is the most prominent phone display on the legacy sites (large phone-handset icon) but carries NO caption, so its purpose (hotline vs duty vs reception) is NOT stated anywhere. Kind is a placeholder — MUST be confirmed with the client.

phones.source: sidebar phone image /sites/default/files/phone_mchs_0.png, present on EVERY page of BOTH sites
phones.note: UNLABELLED — same caveat as 227-95-09. Kind is a placeholder, MUST be confirmed with the client.

phones.source: khf.tj/node/1750 and kchs.tj/node/1230 (structure page), head: полковник Нозимиён Ориф Ислом
phones.note: Closest thing to a press contact on the legacy sites. It is a DEPARTMENT HEAD'S personal number, not a published пресс-служба hotline. Neither site publishes a dedicated press-service phone. The Tajik label here is the department name as printed on khf.tj/node/1750.

phones.source: khf.tj/node/1750, kchs.tj/node/1230 — head: генерал-майор Камолзода Джамшед Джамол
phones.note: This is the unit that would host a дежурная часть / duty desk. Its phone field on the legacy structure pages is TRUNCATED — it literally renders as "(+99237)" with no digits. No duty-officer number is recoverable.

emergencyHotline.note: NO emergency hotline (112, 101, единый телефон доверия, хати боварӣ, горячая линия) appears ANYWHERE on khf.tj or kchs.tj. Exhaustive grep for '112', 'телефон доверия', 'горячая линия', 'hotline', 'боварӣ', 'дежурн' across every fetched page returned zero hits. The three numbers in the sidebar phone image are the only 'call us' messaging the legacy sites have, and they are uncaptioned. The project's config/cms.php already defaults FOOTER_HOTLINE to '112' — that value is NOT sourced from the legacy sites and must be confirmed with the Committee.

emails.source: site-wide header on both sites; central apparatus on both contacts pages; Аппарат Раиса/Председателя on both structure pages
emails.note: PRIMARY official address. Note both the Tajik AND Russian site use the @khf.tj domain.
CONFLICT: the Russian contacts page gives cupravleniya@rs.tj for the same unit. Different mailbox, different domain. Needs clarification.

for.tj: Шуъбаи минтақавии Кумита дар шаҳри Кӯлоб

emails.note: Гиссар/Ҳисор appears ONLY on the Russian contacts page — the Tajik ТАМОС page omits this office entirely.

for.ru: Управление кадров и по работе с личным составом
Управление по материально-техническому, продовольственному и транспортному обеспечениям

emails.note: Personal mailbox of a named officer. Probably should NOT be republished on the new portal.
Unit label not cleanly recoverable from the legacy table markup.

workingHoursNote: NOT PUBLISHED on either legacy site. Grep for 'соати корӣ', 'график работы', 'режим работы', 'время работы' and any HH:MM–HH:MM pattern across all fetched pages returned zero hits. Must be supplied by the client.

socialLinks.source: sidebar social_icons block (block-block-9), every page of both sites
sidebar social_icons block, every page of both sites
appended to node bodies on kchs.tj: «Моро дар Телеграмма пайгирӣ кунед»
socialLinks.note: This is the canonical public channel handle.
LEGACY joinchat invite link — this format was deprecated by Telegram. Use https://t.me/khftj instead. Listed only for completeness.

socialGaps: NO Instagram, NO X/Twitter, NO OK/VK on either legacy site. config/cms.php 'social' global has instagram + x fields — leave them empty unless the client provides accounts.

staticPages.note: Full org chart: unit -> post -> rank -> name -> phones -> email. Rendered as an HTML table; ' | ' in the body marks original table-cell boundaries. This is the source for the Subdivision + Leader models, not for a static page. ASYMMETRY: the Tajik page is INCOMPLETE — it stops after «Раёсати молия ва иқтисод» (~10 units), while the Russian page continues through ~15 more units (Медицинское управление, ЦУКС, Правовой отдел, Отдел по работе с общественностью, региональные УКЧС, Противоградовая служба, РУМЦ, химико-радиометрическая лаборатория, военный госпиталь...). Use the RUSSIAN page as the authoritative org chart; the Tajik unit names for the missing units are NOT available and must be translated by the client.

tj.title: Rapid Emergency Assessment and Coordination Team is a partnership for disaster management in Tajikistan aiming to reduce the impact of disasters on the population of Tajikistan.
tj.body:
REACT Meeting Minutes
Disaster Reports
Inter-Agency Contingency Plans
COVID – 19 Response
Sectoral Coordination
Resources
REACT Secretariat: EMAIL
2020 год апрель
Полевые учения
The specific objectives of REACT
Promoting effective risk reduction, disaster preparedness, disaster response and recovery.
Supporting the coordination and collaboration of humanitarian actors, international organizations and the Government of Tajikistan.
Providing a platform for collaborative planning of risk reduction, preparedness, response and recovery activities.
Providing a platform for the transparent exchange of information, joint planning of operations on disaster risk reduction, preparedness, responseand recovery.
Providing a forum for open discussion of policy and practical issues related to the purpose of REACT.
Положение РЕАКТ, Процедуры и технические задания

staticPages.note: Exists ONLY on khf.tj. Content is ENGLISH prose with a few Russian sub-links ("Полевые учения", "Положение РЕАКТ, Процедуры и технические задания"). There is NO Tajik and NO Russian version of this page. Sub-pages: node/3242 Meeting Minutes, node/3241 Disaster Reports, node/3243 Inter-Agency Contingency Plans, node/3239 COVID-19 Response. 'Sectoral Coordination' and 'Resources' are dead (href=#). An external link points to http://67.20.73.40/?page_id=673 (bare IP, likely dead).

tj.title: Стратегияи миллии рушди Ҷумҳурии Тоҷикистон барои давраи то соли 2030
tj.body:
Маълумоти мухтасар оид ба Стратегияи миллии рушди Ҷумҳурии Тоҷикистон барои давраи то соли 2030
Стратегияи миллии Ҷумҳурии Тоҷикистон оид ба паст кардани хавфи офатҳои табиӣ барои солҳои 2019-2030

staticPages.note: Tajik site only. Page is just a list of links to strategy documents, no prose.

ru.title: Информационные Материалы
ru.body:
Краткий терминологический словарь по чрезвычайным ситуациям.
Программа по подготовке руководящего состава (тадж-рус)
Интерактивные методы обучения взрослой аудитории
Организация оповещения и связи при ЧС
Основы организации управления на местах при ЧС
Основы планирования мероприятий при ЧС
Оценка местных угроз уязвимости и потенциала в Таджикистане
Управление и координация ответных действий во время и после ЧС
Учебно-методическая работа в учебно-методическом центре и на курсах
ЧС природного характера возможные на территории РТ и их последствия
Программа обучения рабочих 15 часов Таджикский и Русский вариант
Программа «Обучения учащихся 2-х и 6-х классов»

staticPages.note: Russian site only. A list of downloadable training/methodological materials. This is the CLOSEST thing either legacy site has to public-safety guidance, but it is aimed at officials/instructors, NOT the general public — it is not a set of «памятки».

tj.title: КҲФ аз оғоз то ба имрӯз. Руҷуъе ба таърихи ҳудудан садсола

staticPages.note: BROKEN ON BOTH SITES. khf.tj/node/102 returns 200 but the article body is EMPTY — only the headline and 'Чоп шуд: 25/06/2016 | admin' render. kchs.tj/node/102 returns HTTP 403 (and /ru/node/102 returns 404), so the Russian history text is unreachable. No history prose can be salvaged; it must be re-authored.

staticPages.note: Russian site only, and nearly empty — it lists only three POST TITLES (Председатель / Первый заместитель / Заместитель) with no names, photos or bios; the names live on the structure page instead. The Tajik footer link for «Роҳбарият» is href='#' (dead).

deadOrMissingPages.status: DEAD LINK — the ФОРУМ top-menu item points at the homepage. There is NO forum page and no forum content anywhere on the site.
DEAD LINK — points at the homepage. No citizen-appeals form exists on the legacy site (the TZ requires building one from scratch).

deadOrMissingPages.menuLabel: Международное сотрудничество / Координация / Мужество / Прогноз погоды / Пресс-релизы
deadOrMissingPages.status: DEAD footer links (href='#'). The equivalents on khf.tj DO resolve, to taxonomy terms 57 / 66 / 65 / 67.
DEAD LINKS on the REACT page.

publicSafetyGuidance.note: NO «памятки» / public-safety guidance section exists on either legacy site. Grep for 'памятк', 'тавсия', 'чӣ бояд кард', 'правила поведения' across all fetched pages returned ZERO hits ('меры безопасности' matched only once, inside a news headline: «Уважаемые туристы, соблюдайте меры безопасности»). The Guide model / «Памятки» content type in this project has NO legacy content to migrate — all guides must be authored from scratch.

emergencyMessaging.note: The legacy sites carry essentially no standing emergency messaging. There is no alert banner, no 'what to do in an emergency' block, and no persistent hotline strip. The only recurring 'call us' element is the uncaptioned sidebar phone image. Emergency/ЧС content appears only as ordinary news items under taxonomy term 71 (RU «Чрезвычайные ситуации»).

globalsMapping.note: Mapped against config/cms.php 'globals' + resources/blueprints/*. There is currently NO 'contacts' global and no phone/address/email/working-hours fields anywhere in the globals blueprints — the only contact-ish field in the whole globals config is footer.hotline (a single text field). To store the data above you will need a NEW 'contacts' global (blueprint + config entry + seeder fallback), or these fields must live on a Page.
globalsMapping.footer.hotline: Legacy sites publish NO hotline. config/cms.php currently defaults FOOTER_HOTLINE='112' — unverified against the legacy sites.
globalsMapping.social.instagram: NOT FOUND on legacy sites — leave null
globalsMapping.social.x: NOT FOUND on legacy sites — leave null
globalsMapping.president.url: http://www.president.tj/ — linked from the footer 'useful links' strip on BOTH sites, consistent with the existing PRESIDENT_URL default (https://president.tj)
globalsMapping.footer.resource_links: Legacy footer link strip (identical on both sites): http://www.president.tj/, http://khovar.tj/, http://news.tj/ (khf only), https://asiaplustj.info (kchs only), http://avesta.tj/, http://www.mvd.tj, http://taj.akn.tj/, http://www.jumhuriyat.tj/, http://mfa.tj/tj/, http://www.mchs.gov.ru/
globalsMapping.footer.government_url: NOT linked on either legacy site (no government.tj link found) — the existing FOOTER_GOVERNMENT_URL default is not legacy-sourced
globalsMapping.footer.egov_url: NOT linked on either legacy site — the existing FOOTER_EGOV_URL default is not legacy-sourced

provenance.method: direct HTTP GET of each page, raw HTML parsed locally; all Tajik/Russian strings are verbatim extractions, none re-typed or translated
provenance.platform: Both legacy sites are Drupal 7 (meta generator). Neither serves /sitemap.xml (404), so page discovery was done from the nav + footer menus.
